DP.144.0000:
Hello, thank you for shopping
with us today.\f
To which floor may I take you?
DP.144.0001: I look forward to serving you again.
DP.144.0004: We are already on that floor?!
DP.144.0005:
Ground floor: Medicine and items for
all your adventure needs.
DP.144.0006:
Second floor: Useful items for all
Pokémon battles.
DP.144.0007:
Third floor: Technical Machines for
powering up Pokémon.
DP.144.0008:
Fourth floor: Desirable decoration
goods and Pokémon Dolls.
DP.144.0009:
Fifth floor: The Rooftop Square for
a refreshing break from shopping.
